card.name: Lethal Inheritance
card.text: Hidden adversary (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone and secretly choose an opponent.) If the chosen opponent would lose the game, you may turn this conspiracy face up and reveal the chosen opponent, then conjure a duplicate of up to three cards from among nonland permanents they control and nonland cards in their graveyard into your hand. Spells conjured this way perpetually gain "You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast this spell."

card.name: Enlightened by Nyx
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each of their colors. At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose a color at random that hasn't been chosen this way. Creatures you control become the chosen color in addition to their other colors, then if there are five or more colors among nontoken creatures you control, create a 0/0 Archon enchantment creature token with flying and haste that's all colors.

card.name: Kitewing Companion
card.text: Flying, first strike Whenever this creature attacks a player, if it was saddled this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card with lesser power than the total power of creatures that saddled this creature this turn. Put that creature card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking that player, then put the rest of the cards revealed this way onto the bottom of your library in a random order. Saddle 1 (Tap any number of other creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Mount becomes saddled until end of turn. Saddle only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Selfish Sire
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature an opponent controls enters, they may put a vow counter on that creature. If they don't, you create a tapped Treasure token. Creatures with vow counters on them can't attack you or planeswalkers you control unless their controller pays {2} for each of those creatures that's attacking you or a planeswalker you control.

card.name: Shirefield Shepherd // Rally the Ranch
card.text:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on each livestock you control. (Birds, Boars, Eggs, Fish, Goats, Horses, Llamas, Oxen, Rabbits, and Sheep are livestock.)
---
Choose up to X. (You may only choose each mode once.) • Create three 1/1 white Sheep creature tokens. • Create two 2/1 red Ox creature tokens. • Create two 1/2 green Boar creature tokens.

card.name: Gatekeep
card.text: Will of the Council — Choose target spell. Starting with you, each player other than that spell's controller votes for misdirection or denial. If misdirection gets more votes, return that spell to its owner's hand, then draw a card. If denial got more votes or the vote is tied, counter that spell.

card.name: An Ode to Dusk
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) Each opponent draws a card. You draw a card for each opponent who drew a card this way. Noncreature spells you cast this turn cost {U}{U} (or {2}) less to cast. Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. Each opponent creates a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. You 1/1 white Soldier creature token for each opponent who created a token this way. Creatures you control get +1/+1, vigilance, and lifelink until end of turn. --- (Back): A Ballad to Dawn

card.name: A Ballad to Dawn
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.) --- (Front): An Ode to Dusk

card.name: Scheming Spectre
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if there is no monarch, that player becomes the monarch. Whenever an opponent draws their second card during each of their turns, this creature connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Yunne, the Starblessed
card.text: Vigilance, haste Yunne can't be blocked or sacrificed. At the beginning of each opponent's first main phase, that player gains control of Yunne until end of turn. Goad it. If Yunne would deal combat damage to an opponent, prevent that damage and exile that many cards from the top of that player's library. Yunne's owner may cast nonland cards exiled this way for as long as they remain exiled, and they may put five other cards exiled with Yunne into their owners' graveyard rather than pay that spell's mana cost.

card.name: Keeper of the Silent Citadel
card.text: Flying, lifelink At the beginning of your end step, choose target opponent. Return a creature card at random from the chosen player's graveyard to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. You and its owner each lose life equal to its power. {2}{B}, Sacrifice another creature: The sacrificed creature's owner mills cards equal to its power. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Trial of the Heart
card.text: Flash At the beginning of each end step, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. You don't lose the game for having less than 0 life. (You can still lose the game for having exactly 0 life.) As long as you have less than 0 life, if you would lose life, you gain that much life instead. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Gaslight
card.text: Gaslight deals 3 damage to any target. You may goad a creature dealt damage this way. Until your next turn, you and permanents you control can't be the target of spells or abilities controlled by an opponent dealt damage this way.

card.name: Sword of Storm and Sunder
Taleless Traitor
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks an opponent, each other creature attacking that opponent gets +1/+0 until end of turn. {2}{BR}{BR}: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield under target opponent's control with a finality counter on it. It's a black Skeleton with menace, haste, and decayed in addition to its other types and abilities. Goad up to three creatures that player controls. (A decayed creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Cull-Beast Channeler
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast non-Human creature spells. {1}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Choose target creature you control, then choose one. If the chosen creature is a Beast, Dinosaur, or Elemental, choose any number instead. • The chosen creature gets +2/+0 and trample until end of turn. • The chosen creature deals damage equal to its power to another creature. • Destroy an artifact or enchantment with mana value less than the chosen creature's power.

card.name: Embrace the Wilds
card.text: Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Starting with the player to your left, each player chooses a keyword that hasn't been chosen from among flying, first strike, deathtouch, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, trample and vigilance. For each keyword chosen this way, put a counter of that kind on that creature.

card.name: Bringer of Evolution
card.text: Each non-Human creature card in your hand has mutate. The mutate cost is equal to that creature's mana cost reduced by {2}. Whenever a creature you control mutates, trigger each of its enters abilities.

card.text: Vigilance, trample, indestructible At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose a player with the fewest cards in hand or tied for the fewest, they become the monarch. Hazoret can't attack or block unless you're the monarch. {2}, Discard a card: Exile the top two cards of your library, You may play those cards this turn.

card.name: Gadgeteer Auctioneer
card.text: Draft this card face up. After you draft a nonland card, you may remove it from the draft face down. (Those cards aren't in your card pool.) At the beginning of your end step, you may reveal a card at random from among cards you removed from the draft with cards named Gadgeteer Auctioneer. Each player may bid life. You start the bidding with a bid of any number. In turn order, each player may top the high bid. The bidding ends if the high bid stands. The high bidder loses life equal to the high bid and casts the revealed spell without paying its mana cost. If you were not the high bidder, you gain life equal to the high bid and create that many treasure tokens.

card.name: Symbiotic Starship
card.text: Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery.) Remove four charge counters from this artifact: This artifact becomes a creature in addition to its other types until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only if this artifact isn't attached to another creature. [4/4]

card.name: Coutier's Gambit
card.text: Before mulligans, each player puts the top card of their library into the Ante Zone. (Do this after setting starting life totals. The winner of the game gains ownership of the anted cards. This isn't gambling because it's a cube.) If you aren't playing at least three games after this draft, perpetually transform this card. --- (Back): Urza's Grand Design

card.name: Urza's Grand Design
card.text: You may play this card from the command zone. {T}: Add {C}. Exhaust — Command — {C}: Add {C}{C}. (You may activate this once each from the battlefield and from the command zone.) --- (Front): Coutier's Gambit

card.name: Ana Iora
card.text: [+1]: Each opponent may discard a card. Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token for each opponent who didn't discard a card this way. [-3]: Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature. [-6]: Each player chooses a creature card in their graveyard. Put those cards onto the battlefield under your control.
